title: DonutSMP Price Overlay
description: Client-side economy HUD for Donut SMP. Shows real-time inventory sell values, highlights least valuable items during raids, and displays container loot worth.
body:
## Loot Liquidity

**Client-side economy HUD for Donut SMP.**

Ever open a chest mid-raid and have no idea if the loot is actually worth grabbing? That's what this fixes. Loot Liquidity pulls live prices from the Donut SMP economy and shows you the numbers that matter — right on your screen, in your tooltips, and inside every container you open.

Your inventory value updates in real time. When you're full at 36/36 slots, it tells you which item to drop so you're not tossing something worth more than what you're picking up. Open a chest and you'll see the total loot value up top, plus your 3 cheapest items get highlighted in red — easy swap decisions.

Every item tooltip shows its sell price per unit, and if you're holding a stack, the total value too. Prices refresh automatically so you don't need to configure anything.

Hit `J` to browse all known prices in a searchable list. Hit `H` to toggle the HUD off if you want a clean screen.

**You'll need:**
- Fabric Loader 0.18.4+
- Fabric API
- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Java 21+

Client-side only — just drop it in your mods folder and go.
